name: repo-tooling
description: Install standard repository development tooling for React, TypeScript, and Next.js projects.

interface.longDescription: Installs standard Biome, Vitest with React Testing Library, Storybook, Husky with commitlint, lint-staged, and env file setup using narrow, repeatable skills.
defaultPrompt: Use repo-tooling to install Biome, Vitest, Storybook, Husky, commitlint, lint-staged, or env files.
Set up standard frontend tooling in this repository.
